content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.70%, Bank Nifty -1.66% with PSU Bank -3.20% leading weakness; VIX +3.49% to 17.20 signals rising risk premium. However, IT, Pharma, and select Capital Goods names are showing strong stock-specific Q4-driven leadership. Book is +1.24% on day with multiple winners ripe for SL trailing; priority is locking gains rather than chasing late-day breakouts with 71 minutes left.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1065.16,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD effectively — keeping SL at 1065.16 (entry +8%, locks +8% gain). CMP 1085 sits 1.8% above SL (>1% trail-gap discipline per Rule 14c). Bullish Q4 (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%), HFC sector strong, target 1135 still 4.6% away. No-op MODIFY avoided — actually leaving SL/target identical, this should be HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL 1065.16 already locks +8.3% gain, CMP 1085 = 1.8% buffer. Thesis intact (Q4 +19% PAT, GNPA <1%, HFC sector leadership). Target 1135 is 4.6% away. No SL change needed; trail floor already above breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge against rising VIX (17.20, +3.49%) and Bank Nifty -1.66%. -0.7% unrealized, SL 121 = -3.3% buffer. Gold thesis intact with safe-haven flows. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL already at entry (820 = breakeven). CMP 829.95, gap to SL 1.2% — at the 1% trail floor minimum. Q4 +14% PAT, +22% revenue, FMCG leadership. Holding SL at breakeven; will not tighten further to avoid forced-exit per Rule 14c (prior BANDHANBNK/BAJFINANCE failure modes). Target 855 still 3% away."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Major winner +8% unrealized after +16% intraday move on Q4 + Encora deal news. SL 1341.52 locks +6.5% gain, CMP 1359 = 1.3% buffer (above 1% floor). Raising target to 1450 reflecting Encora-driven re-rating; Prabhudas TP 2020, Centrum TP 2179. Keeping SL exactly where engine has it (no-op SL, target update only)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3030.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.6%, SL 3030 above entry 3025. CMP 3041, gap 0.4% — BELOW 1% floor. Per Rule 14c, this is a self-stopout setup. Choosing HOLD instead — no MODIFY emit. Correcting: emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 3030 sits just 0.4% below CMP 3041 — already inside 1% trail-floor and any normal downtick stops us out. Defence stocks volatile; not tightening further. Keeping current SL/target. Q4 PAT +24%, defence orderbook visibility strong."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.7% unrealized, SL 825 above entry 806 (locks +2.4%). CMP 836.50, gap to SL 1.4% — within 1% trail floor. Q4 record EBITDA margin 46.5%, MF AUM +21%. Not tightening further — would breach trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3% unrealized but Q4 PAT +37% just announced post-market 5/7 — explosive beat, stock +8.93% intraday now reverting. SL 1465 = -1.7% from CMP, normal noise band. Thesis genuinely intact post-results. Hold to SL or target 1575."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8% unrealized, SL 1580 = -1.5% from CMP 1603. Q4 PAT +317% (loss-to-profit turnaround), 11.8x volume, pharma sector at 52w high. Thesis intact, normal pullback after +19% 4-session run. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2755.00,
      "new_target": 2920.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat unrealized but Q4 results confirm thesis: PAT +10.6%, EBITDA margin expanded to 25.5%, Odisha refrigerant capex doubled to Rs 2,300 Cr. Stock +10.38% today. SL 2755 = -1.1% from CMP 2784, within trail floor. Keeping SL and target unchanged — no-op, switch to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock +10.38% on strong Q4. SL 2755 = -1.1% buffer from CMP. Tightening further would breach 1% trail floor. Hold to target 2920 (+4.9%)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1% unrealized after +9.39% Q4 pop today. SL 9020 = -1% from CMP 9119. Q4 record revenue, capex strong, Rs 47/share dividend. Tightening SL further would force exit; keeping at -1% trail floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.9%, SL 1955 = -2.1% from CMP 1997. Stock spiked to 52w high 2044 intraday on Q4 results; reverting. Thesis intact (defence orderbook 10,961 Cr, FY27 guidance 25%). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Roughly flat. SL 354 = -2.5% from CMP 362.80. Q4 PAT +30.6%, lending book +32%, brokerage upgrades. Thesis intact despite Bank Nifty weakness — ABCAPITAL is private NBFC/conglomerate, not PSU bank. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.4% unrealized after +6.37% Q4 pop today. SL 10440 = -2.6% from CMP 10686. Q4 PAT +34% record, buyback at Rs 12,000/share = 12% premium creates floor. Strong thesis, hold to target 11260."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [

    },

  "watchlist_notes": "Reviewing afternoon BULLISH candidates explicitly per Rule 18: SRF (+0.06) — already held. CAMS (+0.06) — already held. PIDILITIND (+0.07) — already held. PNBHOUSING (+0.06) — already held. MARICO (+0.05) — already held. POLYCAB (+0.04) — already held. ABCAPITAL (+0.06) — already held. BAJAJ-AUTO (+0.10) — already held. WOCKPHARMA (+0.08) — already held. BHARATFORG (+0.06) — already held. Of the non-held BULLISH names: GOLDBEES (+0.04) — already held. Effectively the entire qualifying watchlist IS the existing book. INDUSINDBK (NEUTRAL -0.04) rejected on governance overhang per Rule 13 (SFIO/derivative discrepancy). TATATECH (BEARISH -0.05) rejected on declining ROE/MOFSL Sell. NUVAMA, THERMAX, NBCC, FINCABLES, LAURUSLABS, PERSISTENT, GABRIEL, APOLLOTYRE, RAMCOCEM — full data not provided in this batch, can't act without R:R math. DABUR has working OPEN order at 487 (placed 387m ago, do not duplicate). HFCL working order is stale 3451m (>2 days) — should cancel.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 61% (above 60% floor, below 80% soft target). Cash 39% provides cushion against rising VIX 17.20 and Bank Nifty -1.66%. Today +1.24% across the book is the strongest day of experiment; SLs already trailed up across 6+ positions previously. With 71 minutes to close and broad market weak, focus is preservation of today's +12.5K paper gains rather than late-day chases. Stale HFCL MIS order from yesterday's session needs cancel — but no MIS is currently held so it's harmless if it expires. No new entries warranted: every BULLISH-rated watchlist name surfaced today is already in the book."
}
